overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets with wet reflective pavement, holographic advertisements, outdoor lounge seating, and corporate plazas. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-quality ray-traced lighting and detailed futuristic architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit city street at night, walking alongside a building with cyan neon trim. The DYNALAR holographic billboard looms ahead while palm trees line the right side of the sidewalk. A futuristic vehicle passes by on the street as the camera moves forward through the sparse pedestrian traffic.

agents.ego_description: walking through the outdoor lounge area between white sofas and red rope barriers

low tables between the white sofas

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a semi-covered outdoor lounge area featuring white sofas and red rope barriers. Patrons sit at tables enjoying the evening while the DYNALAR billboard remains visible in the background. The space feels sheltered under the building overhang with mixed lighting from neon and warm interior sources.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with glass floor overlook

events.description: approaching glass floor overlook with ARASAKA branding visible on lower level

agents.ego_description: walking across the plaza and looking down at the illuminated glass floor

bright yellow metal railing surrounding the glass floor section
modern building with reflective glass facade and corporate signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the lounge, the scene opens into a wide corporate plaza featuring a distinctive glass floor overlook with yellow safety railings. The ARASAKA logo is visible through the glass on the level below, illuminated by shifting pink and blue lights. Tall digital billboards and modern glass architecture surround the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing down the neon-lit street past digital billboards and illuminated buildings

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying advertisements on the building facade
building facade illuminated with bright pink and red neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the wet commercial street, passing a building with intense pink neon illumination on the right. Large curved digital billboards dominate the left side while the camera follows a pedestrian walking ahead in the distance. The atmosphere remains consistently cyberpunk with reflective wet surfaces and towering neon advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched cyberpunk district, transitioning from a narrow street into a sheltered lounge and finally across a wide corporate plaza. It begins on a wet city street lined with palm trees and cyan neon trim, moving forward past a looming DYNALAR holographic billboard as a futuristic vehicle glides by. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into a semi-covered outdoor lounge where white sofas and red rope barriers create a sheltered pocket of warm and neon light. The perspective then opens into a vast corporate plaza, crossing a glass floor overlook that reveals the ARASAKA logo illuminated by shifting pink and blue lights below. Finally, the camera exits the plaza to return to the wet commercial street, passing intense pink neon facades and towering curved billboards while following a distant pedestrian into the glowing city night.
